title: Tunisia Declaration of Existence (تصريح بالوجود)
description: The Ministry of Finance's Direction Générale des Impôts (DGI, "الإدارة العامة للأداءات")'s "تصريح بالوجود" (Declaration of Existence), the tax-registration filing that every natural person practicing an activity subject to professional-body oversight, and every legal person (company), must lodge with the tax authority to obtain a tax identifier (matricule fiscal) and declare their activity, tax regime, and VAT status — Tunisia's own equivalent of a combined business/tax registration trigger, since the Registre National des Entreprises' own site offers only document checklists rather than a fillable registration form. Fetched directly and unauthenticated as a static PDF from the Ministry of Finance's own site, finances.gov.tn. Opens towards Tunisia's Business Formation vertical (GOV-4659, "GovSchema Standard Research"), picked up from GOV-4638's own banked candidate (that cycle opened Tunisia as the registry's 94th jurisdiction via a companion DGSN passport form; this form is authored under a different authority, DGI, not DGSN). This schema does not submit the declaration itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Tunisia, its Ministry of Finance, or the Direction Générale des Impôts.

authority.name: Direction Générale des Impôts (Ministère des Finances)

source.documentRef: تصريح بالوجود — Déclaration d'existence (Declaration of Existence)

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/hash, monolingual-Arabic extraction method (node-canvas render used to read the text, since the text layer's own glyph order did not decode into readable Arabic), the isLegalEntity discriminator (not printed explicitly on the form, inferred from its own two-part natural-person/legal-person structure), every requiredWhen judgment call, and disclosed scope exclusions (administrative office-reference codes at the top of page 1, and the second representative slot / single-member-LLC owner block banked for a future companion cycle).

fields.name: declarationNature
fields.label: Declaration Nature
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, top-left checkbox pair — "أوّلي" (Initial) / "تحيين" (Update), footnote "ضع علامة في القسيمة المناسبة" (mark the appropriate box)

fields.name: declarationTrigger
fields.label: Filing Circumstance
fields.description: Whether this declaration is filed spontaneously by the taxpayer, or following a tax-audit discovery of an unregistered activity. See VERIFICATION.md for why this is modelled as applicant/preparer-facing rather than an administration-only code.

fields.name: existingTaxId
fields.label: Existing Tax Identifier (Matricule Fiscal)
fields.description: Only meaningful when updating an already-registered taxpayer's file; a genuine initial declaration has no tax identifier yet — it is assigned by DGI upon processing this filing.

fields.name: isLegalEntity
fields.label: Declarant Is a Legal Entity (Company)
fields.sourceRef: Whole-form structural inference — page 1's own natural-person fields ("الاسم"/"اللقب", birth date, sex) versus page 2's own header "خاص بالأشخاص المعنويين" (specific to legal persons) and its legal-representative table
fields.description: Not a printed checkbox on this form — this registry's own discriminator distinguishing the natural-person path (page 1's name/birth fields, individually attested) from the legal-person path (a company name, plus page 2's legal-representative block), matching this registry's isBodyCorporate discriminator precedent (see e.g. zm/pacra/company-incorporation) for forms that print natural-person and legal-person sections side by side with no explicit either/or signal. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: individualFamilyName
fields.label: Family Name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "اللقب", printed on the same line as, and referring back to, الاسم

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Company / Corporate Name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "أو الاسم الاجتماعي" (or the corporate name), printed on its own line directly below الاسم/اللقب

fields.name: idDocumentType
fields.label: Identity Document Type
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — identity table, "الرمز ( )" column; footnote (page 2) "الرمز: – رقم بطاقة التعريف الوطنية – رقم بطاقة الإقامة للأجانب – رقم جواز السفر"

fields.name: tradeRegisterNumber
fields.label: Trade Register Number
fields.description: Applies to declarants already or concurrently registered on the commercial trade register; not every declarant under this form is a trader (e.g. a professional under a professional body's oversight may have none), so left unconditional-optional rather than gated on isLegalEntity.

fields.name: court
fields.label: Court of the Trade Register
fields.description: The commercial court (tribunal) holding the trade register entry named in tradeRegisterNumber above.

fields.name: socialSecurityRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Social Security Registration Number
fields.description: The declarant's own employer/affiliate registration number with the social security fund, when already registered.

fields.name: activityAreaCode
fields.label: Business Activity Address — Locality Code
fields.description: A short boxed code alongside the locality fields — likely drawn from DGI's own geographic-locality nomenclature; the source does not explain how it is derived, so it is modelled optional rather than assuming the applicant always knows it. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الجنسية ( )"; footnote (page 2) "الرقم بالبلاد التونسية - الجنسية - تونسية - أجنبية"
fields.description: A two-option checkbox (Tunisian / Foreign), not a free-text nationality name.

fields.name: legalForm
fields.label: Legal Form
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الشكل القانوني ( )"; footnote (page 2) "خاص بالشركات" (specific to companies)
fields.description: The company's legal form (e.g. SARL, SUARL, SA) — no options are printed on this specimen; modelled as free text since the footnote confirms this box applies to companies but names no closed vocabulary.

fields.name: activityStartDate
fields.label: Activity Start Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "بداية من" (starting from), end of the phone/fax/nationality/legal-form line

fields.name: foundingLawFinanceReceiptCode
fields.label: Founding Act Registration — Finance Receipt Office Code
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "تسجيل القانون الأساسي ( ): رمز قباضة المالية"
fields.description: Identifies the local Recette des Finances office where the company's founding statutes (or, for an individual, the underlying constitutive act, if any) were registered/stamped.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "تاريخ الولادة بالنسبة إلى الأشخاص الطبيعيين" (date of birth, for natural persons)

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الجنس ( )": "ذكر" (Male) / "أنثى" (Female), same line as تاريخ الولادة

fields.name: primaryActivityStartDate
fields.label: Primary Activity Start Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "بداية من", same line as رمز النشاط الأصلي

fields.name: secondaryActivityStartDate
fields.label: Secondary Activity Start Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "بداية من", same line as رمز النشاط الثانوي

fields.name: taxRegimeCategory
fields.label: Tax Regime Category (Natural Persons)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "النظام الجبائي بالنسبة إلى الأشخاص الطبيعيين ( )" (tax regime for natural persons), two labelled bullet groups

fields.name: professionalTaxRegime
fields.label: Tax Regime — Non-Commercial Professional Income
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الذين يحققون أرباح المهن غير التجارية: نظام حقيقي" (real/actual regime) "/ على أساس قاعدة تقديرية" (on an estimated basis)

fields.name: commercialTaxRegime
fields.label: Tax Regime — Industrial & Commercial Income
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الذين يحققون أرباح صناعية وتجارية: نظام حقيقي / نظام حقيقي مبسط / نظام حقيقي مبسط طبقا لأحكام الفصل (طبقا للمعيار المحاسبي عدد) من قانون المالية لسنة 2016 عدد 42"
fields.description: Three checkboxes: real regime; simplified real regime; simplified real regime per the accounting-standard provisions of Article 42 of Finance Law No. 2016 for that year.

fields.name: categoryChangeDate
fields.label: Category Change Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "تاريخ تغيير الصنف", same line as تاريخ الانضواء تحت النظام الجبائي

fields.name: vatStatus
fields.label: VAT Liability Status
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الصفة بالنظر للأداء على القيمة المضافة ( )"; footnote (page 2) "إجباري - جزئي - اختياري"
fields.description: Whether the declarant is mandatorily, partially, or optionally (electively) subject to VAT.

fields.name: vatEffectiveDate
fields.label: VAT Status Effective Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "تاريخ دخول الصفة حيز التنفيذ" (effective date of this status), same line as الصفة بالنظر للأداء على القيمة المضافة

fields.name: electionWithdrawalDate
fields.label: VAT Election Withdrawal Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "تاريخ التخلي" (withdrawal date), same line as تاريخ الطلب

fields.name: headOfficeStreet
fields.label: Personal Address / Registered Office — Street
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "العنوان الشخصي أو عنوان المقر الاجتماعي : النهج" (personal address, or registered-office address for a company)

fields.name: headOfficePostalCode
fields.label: Personal Address / Registered Office — Postal Code

fields.name: headOfficeAreaCode
fields.label: Personal Address / Registered Office — Locality Code

fields.name: headOfficeEmployeeCount
fields.label: Number of Employees at This Address
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "عدد العمال", same block as العنوان الشخصي أو عنوان المقر الاجتماعي

fields.name: notificationStreet
fields.label: Elected Notification Address — Street
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "عنوان المقر المختار للتبليغ : النهج" (elected address for official notification)

fields.name: hasSecondaryBranches
fields.label: Has Secondary Branches
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "هل لكم فروع ثانوية ؟ نعم/لا ( )" (do you have secondary branches? yes/no)

fields.name: numberOfSecondaryBranches
fields.label: Number of Secondary Branches
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "عدد الفروع الثانوية", same line as هل لكم فروع ثانوية

fields.name: secondaryBranchesStartDate
fields.label: Secondary Branches Start Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "بداية من", same line as هل لكم فروع ثانوية

fields.name: taxIncentive1Name
fields.label: Tax Incentive 1 — Name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الإمتيازات الجبائية" (tax incentives) section, first "الامتياز" blank line

fields.name: taxIncentive1Code
fields.label: Tax Incentive 1 — Code
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — first "الرمز ( )" in the tax-incentives section

fields.name: taxIncentive1StartDate
fields.label: Tax Incentive 1 — Start Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — first "بداية من" in the tax-incentives section

fields.name: taxIncentive2Name
fields.label: Tax Incentive 2 — Name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "الإمتيازات الجبائية" section, second "الامتياز" blank line
fields.description: This registry's own bounded-slot modelling of the form's own two identically-printed tax-incentive entries; the source prints no explicit cap or a companion count field, but only two rows are printed. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: taxIncentive2Code
fields.label: Tax Incentive 2 — Code
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — second "الرمز ( )" in the tax-incentives section

fields.name: taxIncentive2StartDate
fields.label: Tax Incentive 2 — Start Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — second "بداية من" in the tax-incentives section

fields.name: incentiveLocationCity
fields.label: Incentivized Activity Location — City
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "المدينة", printed directly below the two tax-incentive entries
fields.description: This block's own tie to the tax-incentives section above it (rather than being a third, otherwise-unlabelled generic address) is this registry's own reading — Tunisia's regional-development tax incentives are commonly zone-specific, and no other heading separates this block from الإمتيازات الجبائية. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: incentiveLocationEmployeeCount
fields.label: Number of Employees at the Incentivized Location

fields.name: fiscalYearEndDate
fields.label: Fiscal Year-End (Month/Year)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 — "تاريخ ختم السنة المالية بداية من" (fiscal year closing date, starting from), "الشهر"/"السنة" boxes only
fields.description: Printed with only month and year boxes (no day box, unlike every other date on this form) — modelled as a string rather than this schema's date type, which implies day-level precision the source does not print. Expected shape: MM-YYYY.

fields.name: representativeFirstName
fields.label: Legal Representative — First Name
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — "هوية الممثل القانوني للشركة" (identity of the company's legal representative) table, "الإسـم" column

fields.name: representativeIdDocumentIssueDate
fields.label: Legal Representative — Identity Document Issue Date

fields.name: representativeCapacity
fields.label: Legal Representative — Capacity
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — legal-representative table, "الصفة ( )" column; footnote "صفة الممثل القانوني للشركة: - رئيس مدير عام (بالنسبة إلى الشركات خفية الإسم على سبيل المثال) - وكيل (بالنسبة إلى الشركات ذات المسؤولية المحدودة على سبيل المثال) - ممثل قانوني آخر"
fields.description: Chairman & CEO (e.g. for joint-stock/anonymous companies), Agent (e.g. for limited-liability companies), or another legal representative.

fields.name: representativeDirectPhone
fields.label: Legal Representative — Direct Phone Number
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — legal-representative table, "رقم الهاتف المباشر ( )" column

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Declaration Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — closing attestation, second blank on the same line as في

fields.name: applicantSignature
fields.label: Signature and Stamp
fields.sourceRef: Page 2 — "الختـم والإمضـاء" (stamp and signature), beside the sworn statement "إني الممضي أسفله ( ) أصرّح بصحة البيانات التي تتضمنها هذا التصريح وألتزم بأن أعلم مصالح الجباية بكل تغيير يطرأ على هذه البيانات" (I the undersigned declare the accuracy of the data in this declaration and undertake to inform the tax authorities of any change to this data)
fields.description: Footnote confirms the signatory's identity is either the individual declarant (individualFirstName/individualFamilyName) or the company's legal representative (representativeFirstName/representativeFamilyName) already modelled above — no separate signatory-identity field is added.

documents.label: Detailed list of secondary branches
documents.sourceRef: Page 2 footnote — "اصحب قائمة مفصّلة في الفروع (خفية الإسم على سبيل المثال) في صورة وجودها" (attach a detailed list of branches, e.g. for anonymous/joint-stock companies, if any exist)
documents.handling: Only meaningful when hasSecondaryBranches is true; the source names this attachment specifically for companies with multiple branches.
